description: MCP server for iFlow Search web search, image search, and URL fetch tools.
name: io.github.zhengyanglsun/iflow-search

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the iFlow Search API. Obtain one at https://platform.iflow.cn.
environmentVariables.name: IFLOW_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional MCP client slug forwarded to iFlow as the IFlow-MCP-Client header. Matches /^[a-z0-9._-]{1,64}$/.
environmentVariables.name: IFLOW_MCP_CLIENT

environmentVariables.description: Optional MCP client version forwarded to iFlow as the IFlow-MCP-Client-Version header. Only honored when IFLOW_MCP_CLIENT is also set.
environmentVariables.name: IFLOW_MCP_CLIENT_VERSION

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the iFlow Search API base URL. Defaults to https://platform.iflow.cn.
environmentVariables.name: IFLOW_BASE_URL

title: iFlow Search
